name: NORACL: Neurogenesis for Oracle-free Resource-Adaptive Continual Learning

description: arXiv:2604.27031v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In a continual learning setting, we require a model to be plastic enough to learn a new task and stable enough to not disturb previously learned capabilities. We argue that this dilemma has an architectural root. A finite network has limited representational and plastic resources, yet the required capacity depends on properties of the fu...
author: Karthik Charan Raghunathan, Christian Metzner, Laura Kriener, Melika Payvand
